metadata.title: Adaptive Powerbuilding Coach
metadata.description: Adaptive bilingual PWA fitness web app

home.title: Adaptive powerbuilding coaching for training, nutrition, readiness, and progress.
home.subtitle: A bilingual fitness PWA built for dynamic targets, workout logging, progress tracking, and competitive Arena accountability.

readiness.title: Readiness adaptation
readiness.body: Training responds to sleep, soreness, stress, motivation, and pain.

training.title: PPL x UL diary
training.body: Use the default program, log sets, and track e1RM progress.

arena.title: Private opt-in Arena
arena.body: Leaderboards show display names only and never expose emails or health data.

home.installInstructions: Open Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen.

auth.anyProvider: Any valid email provider is supported.
auth.demoMode: Supabase is not configured, so demo mode is active.
auth.authError: Authentication failed. Check the email and password.

signInPage.title: Sign in
signInPage.description: Use email and password. Google OAuth is optional later.

signUpPage.title: Sign up
signUpPage.description: Create an account with any valid email provider, then continue to onboarding.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Build your first nutrition targets and select the default PPL x UL program.
onboarding.offer: At the end we calculate calories and macros, select PPL x UL - Aesthetic Cut, and adapt it after readiness check-ins.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Today’s training, nutrition, readiness, and weight trend in one mobile-first view.

profile.title: Profile
profile.body: Email, Telegram username, body metrics, lifting numbers, privacy, and language preferences live here.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Dynamic calories, macros, and carb cycling with a safety-first disclaimer.
nutrition.cycling: Carbs move up on harder training days and down on rest days while protein and fats stay stable.
nutrition.safety: Nutrition targets are planning support, not medical advice.

training.title: Training
training.description: Current plan, exercises, sets, reps, RPE targets, rest times, notes, and progression rules.
training.openProgram: Open dedicated PPL x UL page

diary.title: Training diary
diary.description: Create a workout session, log sets, show previous performance, and estimate PRs.

checkIn.title: Readiness check-in
checkIn.description: Answer before training to adapt the PPL x UL session.
checkIn.recommendation: Adapted PPL x UL recommendation is ready.
checkIn.safety: Do not train through strong pain. Replace or reduce painful movements.

notes.keep_plan_no_pr: Keep the plan without PR attempts.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Body weight, seven-day average, weekly trend, e1RM progress, workout volume, and consistency.

arena.title: Arena
arena.description: Opt-in leaderboard with public display names only.
arena.privacyBody: Users must opt in. Arena shows display names only and never shows email, private health data, or profile records.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Language, units, privacy, leaderboard opt-in, Telegram username, and demo controls.

telegramUsername.title: Telegram username
telegramUsername.body: Profile contact field, not Telegram auth.

support.title: Support the project
support.description: Help a pet/open-source style fitness project reach the first mobile app funding milestone.

project.title: Pet project, public roadmap
project.body: Adaptive Powerbuilding Coach is a small open-source style project built in public. Support is handled through Telegram instead of email.

fund.donorCountUnavailable: Donor count will be updated manually.
fund.reward: First 10 confirmed donors get lifetime free access to the future mobile app.

secret.title: Secret mobile features
secret.body: Some mobile features are intentionally kept secret until the official mobile app development announcement.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: How private data and public leaderboard data are separated.
privacy.body: Private profile, training, nutrition, sleep, and readiness data stay private. Arena uses separate opt-in public data.

terms.title: Terms
terms.body: This app provides training and nutrition planning support and is not medical advice.

pplUl.title: PPL x UL - Aesthetic Cut
pplUl.description: Push / Pull / Legs / Rest / Upper / Lower / Rest with readiness adaptation.

notes.do_not_chase_load_through_pain: do not chase load through pain

restNotes.do_not_turn_rest_day_into_hard_cardio: Do not turn rest day into hard cardio.

rules.increase_load_when_top_reps_all_sets_at_: Increase load when all sets reach the top of the rep range at target RPE.
rules.isolation_add_smallest_increment: Isolation exercises add the smallest available increment.
rules.cut_do_not_force_rpe_10_every_set: On a cut, do not force RPE 10 on every set.
rules.rpe_10_only_last_safe_isolation_set: RPE 10 mainly belongs on the last set of safe isolation exercises.

pplUl.title: PPL x UL
pplUl.description: Push / Pull / Legs / Rest / Upper / Lower / Rest.
